column1: The cyrillic alphabet is the alphabet used in Russian text. It is one of the most___________used alphabets in the world. (WIDE)
The alphabet is used in_____________languages, including Russian, Bulgarian, Serbian and Ukrainian. (VARY)
It began in the_____________century in the Bulgarian Empire. It was created by two Greek brothers, Cyril and Methodius. (TEN)
It was formed from the Greek alphabet, although there are many___________between the two. (DIFFER)
Some people would like the alphabet to be called the Russian alphabet, to refer to Russia, just as the Greek alphabet refers to Greece. They____________with the name Cyrillic. (AGREE)
The alphabet recently became the EU's third_____________script, after Latin and Greek, when Bulgaria joined the EU. (OFFICE)
Gina was going to play the part of a very old woman in the school play. She was looking forward to the first___________of the show. (PERFORM)
A few minutes before going on stage, she had an accident. She didn't notice a box on the floor, fell over it, and hurt her knee very__________ . (BAD)
She could barely walk and she didn't know what to do. She felt__________ . (USE)
Then she remembered the expression "the show must go on". Although Gina's pain was____________, she decided to carry on with the play. (TERROR)
Every second on stage was really____________ , but somehow she managed it. (PAIN)
Everyone thought her acting was very_______________ and that she really looked like an old lady! (IMPRESS)
